{
  "schema_version": "1.0.0",
  "record_type": "synthesis_group",
  "id": "senolytics-dq-bone-registry-synthesis-compatibility-2026-06-21",
  "name": "D+Q bone RCT registry-extracted synthesis compatibility",
  "assessed_at": "2026-06-28T16:27:27Z",
  "question": "Can the D+Q postmenopausal bone RCT registry-extracted endpoint results be pooled for a meta-analysis estimate?",
  "track_ids": [
    "senolytics"
  ],
  "hallmark_ids": [
    "cellular_senescence",
    "stem_cell_exhaustion"
  ],
  "intervention_ids": [
    "dasatinib-quercetin"
  ],
  "compatibility_basis": {
    "population": "Postmenopausal women in the D+Q and untreated-control arms of one phase 2 randomized trial.",
    "intervention": "Intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin.",
    "comparator": "Untreated control.",
    "endpoint_family": "Bone turnover, bone density, SASP, and aggregate safety endpoints.",
    "time_horizon": "Baseline to 2, 4, or 20 weeks depending on endpoint.",
    "effect_metric": "Percent change, descriptive group summaries, p-value-only effects, or a registry aggregate adverse-event risk ratio depending on endpoint.",
    "variance_model": "No pooling model selected because effect uncertainty fields are absent or incompatible."
  },
  "outcome_ids": [
    "dq-bone-ctx-20wk",
    "dq-bone-p1np-2wk",
    "dq-bone-p1np-4wk",
    "dq-bone-p1np-20wk",
    "dq-bone-bmd-20wk",

    "dq-bone-bmd-20wk-inconclusive",
    "dq-bone-sasp-2wk-null",
    "dq-bone-adverse-events-20wk-mixed"
  ],
  "compatibility_status": "not_poolable",
  "pooling_decision": "pooling_blocked",
  "pooling_rationale": "The grouped results are useful for an evidence map, but they mix primary, secondary, biomarker, BMD, SASP, and safety endpoints across different time horizons. Several non-safety records only provide p-values or descriptive summaries, and the registry full-range dispersion is not a variance estimate suitable for pooling. The aggregate adverse-event result now has a registry-derived risk ratio and uncertainty but remains incompatible with the mixed endpoint set.",
  "non_pooling_reason": "Do not compute a pooled estimate until endpoint-specific compatibility groups contain at least two comparable studies and each included result has an effect value plus CI, standard error, or variance.",
  "pooling_requirements": {
    "minimum_result_count": 2,
    "required_result_maturity_statuses": [
      "registry_extracted",
      "full_text_extracted",
      "agent_reviewed",
      "supervisor_agent_reviewed",
      "accepted"

      "effect.uncertainty",
      "analysis.comparison",
      "sample_size",
      "group_values[].sample_size",
      "group_values[].statistic",
      "group_values[].dispersion"
    ],

          "effect.uncertainty"

        ],
